chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1287 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of cases (Priority) 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 22.11.2022 Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General along with Inspector Ghulam Shabbir and ASI Dhani Bux on behalf of SSP, Sukkur. <><><><>..<><><><> None present for the petitioner. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Today SSP, Sukkur / respondent No.4 has filed statement to the effect that father of the petitioner retired from service on superannuation w.e.f. 03.04.2013. It has further been stated that case of the petitioner does not fall under the purview of Rule 11 of Sindh Civil Servant Rules, 1974 for his appointment; however, petitioner would be provided 10 additional marks in aggregate by the appropriate Selection Board / Committee, if he qualified the test / examination / interview. Since no right of the petitioner is created for his appointment in police department on son quota, the instant petition is dismissed accordingly being devoid of any merits. Judge Judge ARBROHI
